changelog: Fix: QUIC/ERR_QUIC_PROTOCOL_ERROR — UDP/443 (HTTP/3) is now fast-rejected so Chrome falls back to TCP HTTPS
Fix: Chrome/browser browsing now works — QUIC blackholed, TCP/TLS (HTTP/2) fallback active
New: Browser compatibility probes run post-connect — tests example.com, vg.no, cloudflare.com over TCP/TLS
New: QUIC status reported in diagnostics — UDP/QUIC Port 443: Blocked → Chrome uses TCP fallback
New: DNS resolution verified end-to-end through tunnel after connect
Improved: Connection log now shows TCP HTTPS, DNS, QUIC, and Browser Compatibility results
